property.name: skip
property.value: Seed missing for admin@sportivox.local — load demo data with `make seed`

testcase.name: @auth Sportivox authentication › invalid credentials show an inline error
@auth Sportivox authentication › logout returns to landing
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › @smoke @critical landing page renders headline and CTA
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › @smoke login page accepts inputs
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › @smoke signup page loads (multi-step)
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › @smoke forgot password page exists
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › @critical browse opportunities works unauthenticated
Sportivox landing & public surfaces › 404 handler returns a friendly page
Opportunities flow › @critical athlete can browse and open an opportunity
Opportunities flow › @critical club user sees post-opportunity CTA
Opportunities flow › scout can search and filter
Opportunities flow › organizer Tournaments page shows cricket scoring link
Social surfaces › @smoke feed renders
Social surfaces › @smoke reels page loads without error
Social surfaces › @smoke blogs index loads
Social surfaces › @smoke notifications page loads
Social surfaces › @smoke messages page loads
Social surfaces › profile shows user info
@scoring Analytics dashboard › @critical analytics page renders all sections
@scoring Analytics dashboard › partnership row appears after the wicket
@scoring Analytics dashboard › fielding leaderboard shows the catcher
Scoring console — auth › @smoke login page renders
Scoring console — auth › @smoke signup page renders
Scoring console — auth › @critical admin/organizer can sign in

property.name: skip
property.value: Scoring seed/account missing — start scoring backend with seed

testcase.name: Scoring console — auth › rejected credentials stay on login
@scoring Live scoring — PPTX Level 1 + Level 2 › @critical scorer can record a Level 1 ball
@scoring Live scoring — PPTX Level 1 + Level 2 › @critical scorer can record a 4 and innings boundary counter updates
@scoring Live scoring — PPTX Level 1 + Level 2 › @critical scorer can record a Level 2 wicket (caught)
@scoring Live scoring — PPTX Level 1 + Level 2 › @critical scorer can undo last ball
@scoring Live scoring — PPTX Level 1 + Level 2 › derived metrics strip renders on scoreboard
@scoring Match configuration › @critical config screen renders all PPTX sections
@scoring Match configuration › organizer can save configuration

Scoring console — tournaments › @critical organizer can open the new tournament form
